ai_summary: MosChip Technologies Limited has allotted 2,42,636 equity shares to employees exercising stock options, leading to a minor 0.125% increase in total outstanding shares and generating approximately Rs. 1.25 crore in cash for the company. This routine ESOP exercise, conducted in compliance with SEBI regulations, has a negligible dilutive effect on per-share metrics, with the diluted EPS for the last fiscal year reported at Rs 1.75. No material red flags are apparent.
